opinion.h4: BARNES v. TEXAS. ON PETITION FOR WRIT OF CERTIORARI TO THE COURT OF CRIMINAL APPEALS OF TEXAS. No. 346, Misc. Decided March 8, 1965.
opinion.p: Waggoner Carr, Attorney General of Texas, and Howard M. Fender, Charles B. Swanner, Gilbert J. Pena and Allo B. Crow, Jr., Assistant Attorneys General, for respondent.

The motion for leave to proceed in forma pauperis and the petition for writ of certiorari are granted. The judgment is reversed. Giordenello v. United States, 357 U.S. 480; Aguilar v. Texas, 378 U.S. 108.
